calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Instructing Trustee To: 1)Provide Information To Beneficiaries And Summary Account; 2) Make Preliminary Distributions;
Off Calendar Mar-08-2016 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Instructing Trustee To: 1)Provide Information To Beneficiaries And Summary Account; 2) Make Preliminary Distributions;
Off Calendar Feb-09-2016 Continued To Mar-08-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jim Colopy for (trustee) First Republic Bank. Konstantine Demeris (via court call) for (petitioner) Roy Garcia.

The Court stated that the parties have entered into a stipulation and asked where everything stands. Mr. Demeris stated that they have settled the entire matter, that there was a series of negotiations and that they are asking the court to sign an order approving the settlement. The Court told the parties that they would need to petition to request the approval of the settlement, that it could grant the petition regarding preliminary distribution but that there is nothing else before the court. Mr. Demeris stated that that would suffice in the interim and then they could submit a petition. Mr. Colopy stated that they cannot agree, that a provision of the settlement was that Mr. Garcia's petition is to be dismissed. The Court stated that it will continue the matter for the parties to decide how they want to proceed and that a petition for approval of settlement would need to be noticed. Mr. Demeris stated that he will be able to obtain time waivers from everyone. The petition for order instructing trustee, etc., was continued to March 8, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Instructing Trustee To: 1)Provide Information To Beneficiaries And Summary Account; 2) Make Preliminary Distributions;
